frame_analyses.description: Initial view showing uterine anatomy with blue marking tape on isthmus, uterine manipulator in place
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good visualization of target anatomy, clear marking visible

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Target marking is well-defined and positioned appropriately

frame_analyses.description: Instrument selection menu visible, clip applicator being selected
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appropriate instrument selection for endoloop task

frame_analyses.description: Multiple instrument options displayed including sterilization clip applicator
frame_analyses.technique_notes: System showing various laparoscopic instruments available

frame_analyses.description: Sterilization clip applicator approaching the blue-marked isthmus

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clip mechanism engaging properly, tissue compression visible

confidence_rationale: This appears to be a surgical simulation video showing tubal sterilization with clip placement rather than FLS endoloop task. The timing and technique are well-observed, but task identification may not match standard FLS Task 3 endoloop parameters.
cannot_determine: Whether this is actually FLS Task 3 endoloop or a different laparoscopic procedure
Exact loop material and pre-tied status typical of FLS endoloop task
technique_summary: Excellent precision and timing for clip placement procedure. Very efficient approach and deployment with accurate targeting of the marked tissue.
strengths: Precise instrument positioning at target mark
Efficient completion time well within expert range
improvement_suggestions: Verify this matches standard FLS endoloop task parameters
Confirm use of appropriate endoloop material rather than sterilization clips
